# The Laurel Room
> Brampton's first boutique event venue for intimate celebrations of 50-125 guests.

## About
The Laurel Room is an intimate, beautifully styled event venue in Brampton, Ontario, opening Summer 2026. Founded by Khushbu Dhahan, it fills a gap in the market: no premium intimate venue for 50-125 guests existed in a city of 700,000+ people. We operate a BYOC (Bring Your Own Caterer) model with five curated design presets.

## Key Facts
- Location: Brampton, Ontario, Canada (Steeles Ave East corridor)
- Capacity: 50-125 seated guests
- Model: BYOC (Bring Your Own Caterer) — families bring their own food, music, vendors
- Pricing: $895-$2,995 per event (3 tiers + signature packages)
- Opening: Summer 2026
- Founder: Khushbu Dhahan
- Phone: 647-286-1161
- Email: hello@thelaurelroom.ca
- Website: https://thelaurelroom.ca
- Instagram: @thelaurelroom

## Packages
- The Space (from $895): Blank canvas venue rental with tables, chairs, kitchenette
- The Styled Experience (from $1,695): Fully styled room with choice of 5 design presets
- The Full Celebration (from $2,495): Full-day premium with coordinator and enhanced styling
- Signature: Mehndi Night ($2,195), Morning Celebration ($1,095), Corporate Retreat ($795)

## Design Presets
1. Laurel — Sage green, botanical, eucalyptus, romantic
2. Golden Hour — Warm amber, antique brass, candlelight, moody
3. Blush — Dusty pink, rose gold, peonies, feminine
4. Monochrome — Black/white, modern, clean lines
5. Regal — Jewel tones, gold, crystal, dramatic opulence

## Event Types
Mehndi nights, baby showers, bridal showers, intimate weddings, nikkah ceremonies, aqiqahs, milestone birthdays, engagement parties, corporate events, holiday celebrations (Diwali, Eid)

## Competitive Advantage
- Only BYOC venue in Brampton with an elevated aesthetic
- Purpose-built for 50-125 guests (not a partitioned banquet hall)
- Industrial-romantic aesthetic with 18-foot ceilings
- Five curated design presets (not bare-bones)
- Transparent pricing (no hidden fees)
- Deep understanding of multicultural celebrations
